name: Christopher Knight Home Haddan Recliner - Charcoal : Upholstered Accent Chair, Polyester, Hardwood Frame
description: Enjoy the comfort of this Christopher Knight Home Haddan Recliner which will give you the ultimate seat in your living room. It will be the place to sit, and your guests will all want a crack at it. With its stylish, clean design, it will match with any décor and is sure to enhance any living room space. This recliner would also be a great addition to your bedroom to create a quiet relaxing spot to go to after a long day. This Christopher Knight Home Haddan Recliner will be a perfect addition to your home.
